diagrams.title: Operating System Services Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the major categories of OS services and their relationships to users and hardware
elements: Operating System Services (Process, Memory, File, I/O, Security, Communication, etc.)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the position of OS services between users and hardware

diagrams.title: Process Management Service
diagrams.description: Illustrates the process life cycle and management operations
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how OS manages process execution

diagrams.title: Memory Management Service
diagrams.description: Shows memory allocation and virtual memory concepts
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how OS manages memory resources
